items.content:
▶ 第一部分：安装篇
(只要会复制，就能装好)
**1. 准备工作（先看一眼）** 电脑检查：确保你的电脑是苹果电脑 (macOS 12.0 或更高版本)。 空间检查：留出大约 10GB 的空余空间 **2. 第一步：打开“黑框框”（终端）** 这是小白最怕的一步，但其实很简单： 按下键盘上的 Command (⌘) + 空格键。 在弹出的搜索框里输入 Terminal（或者中文“终端”）。 看到一个黑色的小图标，按回车键打开它。 **3. 第二步：一行代码搞定安装** 直接复制下面这段代码，粘贴到那个黑框框里，然后按回车： ``` curl -fsSL https://openclaw.ai/install.sh | bash ``` 若出现下图提示需要输入 sudo 时，请执行下方脚本 ``` sudo curl -fsSL https://openclaw.ai/install.sh | bash ```

图：需要输入sudo提示

注意：如果黑框提示要输入 Password 并在前面有个小钥匙🔑，就输入你的开机密码。 高能预警：输入密码时，屏幕上什么都不会显示（不会有星号），输完直接按回车即可。 **4. 第三步：跟着提示走（核心配置）** 安装脚本跑完后，黑框会问你几个问题，请“闭眼”按下下面操作： 用户协议：看到 I understand... Continue?
👉 操作：输入 Yes 然后按回车。 安装模式：看到 Setup mode
👉 操作：选择 QuickStart（快速开始模式）然后按回车。 模型提供商：看到 Model/auth provider
👉 操作：国内用户选 DeepSeek、Qwen（通义千问）或 Moonshot（月之暗面）；国外用户选 OpenAI 或 Anthropic。 填写 API 信息： 如果有 Key：按提示粘贴你的 API Key。 如果没有：输入 No 先跳过，以后再配。 自定义功能：看到这几个问题Default model、Select channel、Install missing skill dependencies、Enable hooks?
👉 操作：根据自身需求选择 开启技能：看到 Configure skills now?
👉 操作：输入 Yes。 最后启动：看到 How do you want to hatch your bot?
👉 操作：选择 Open the Web UI（打开网页界面）。看到浏览器自动弹出一个漂亮的界面，你就大功告成了！ ▶ 第二部分：验证篇
(看看成功没)
**在那个黑框框里输入下面这行命令：** ``` openclaw --version ``` 如果它吐出了一串数字（比如 v1.2.0），恭喜你，你已经正式跨入 AI 自动化的的大门了！

▶ Part 1: Installation
(As long as you can copy and paste, you can install it)
**1. Preparation (Take a quick look)** Computer Check: Ensure your computer is a Mac(macOS 12.0 or higher)。 Space Check: Free up approximately 10GB of available space. **2. Step 1: Open the "Black Box" (Terminal)** This is the step beginners fear most, but it's actually very simple: Press Command (⌘) + Space bar on your keyboard. Type Terminalin the search box that appears. Click the small black icon or press Enter to open it. **3. Step 2: Install with One Line of Code** Copy the code below, paste it into the terminal, and press Enter: ``` curl -fsSL https://openclaw.ai/install.sh | bash ``` If the prompt shown below appears requesting sudo please execute the script below instead: ``` sudo curl -fsSL https://openclaw.ai/install.sh | bash ```

Image: Sudo input prompt

Note: If the terminal asks for a Password and displays a small key 🔑 icon, enter yourlogin password。 Pro Tip: When typing the password, nothing will appear on the screen (no asterisks); just press Enter after typing. **4. Step 3: Follow the Prompts (Core Configuration)** After the installation script finishes, the terminal will ask a few questions. Please follow these steps: User Agreement: When you seeI understand... Continue?
👉 Action: Type Yes and press Enter. Setup Mode: When you see Setup mode
👉 Action: Select QuickStartand press Enter.。 Model Provider: When you see Model/auth provider
👉 Action: Domestic users (China) select DeepSeek、Qwenor Moonshot; International users select OpenAI or Anthropic。 Enter API Information: If you have a Key: Paste yourAPI Key。 as prompted. If you don't: Type No to skip for now and configure it later. Custom Features: When you see Default model、Select channel、Install missing skill dependencies、Enable hooks?
👉 Action: Choose according to your needs. Enable Skills: When you see Configure skills now?
👉 Action: Type Yes。 Final Launch: When you see How do you want to hatch your bot?
👉 Action: Select Open the Web UI.Once your browser automatically opens a beautiful interface, you are all set! ▶ Part 2: Verification
(Check if it was successful)
Enter the following command in the terminal: ``` openclaw --version ``` If it returns a string of numbers (e.g., v1.2.0), congratulations! You have officially entered the world of AI automation!

▶ 常见问题篇 **报错 1：Homebrew / shallow clone** **报错情况：homebrew-core is a shallow clone**

复制下面命令，一条一条在黑框框里回车执行

``` sudo rm -rf /usr/local/Homebrew/Library/Taps/homebrew/homebrew-core ``` ``` sudo mkdir -p /usr/local/Homebrew/Library/Taps/homebrew/homebrew-core ``` ``` sudo chown -R $(whoami) /usr/local/Homebrew/Library/Taps/homebrew ``` ``` cd /usr/local/Homebrew/Library/Taps/homebrew/homebrew-core ``` ``` git init && git remote add origin https://mirrors.ustc.edu.cn/homebrew-core.git && git fetch --depth=1 origin main && git checkout -b main origin/main ``` ``` git -C /usr/local/Homebrew/Library/Taps/homebrew/homebrew-core fetch --unshallow ``` ``` brew update ``` **报错 2：brew安装被锁定 / 下载卡住** **报错情况：安装一直不动、提示锁文件**

直接复制下面这段代码，粘贴到那个黑框框里，然后按回车

``` rm -rf /Users/$(whoami)/Library/Caches/Homebrew/downloads/*.incomplete ``` **报错 3：Node.js 版本不够 / 装不上**
要求：必须 ≥ 22.16.0 **Intel 芯片一键安装：**

复制下面命令，一条一条在黑框框里回车执行

``` curl -fsSL https://nodejs.org/dist/v22.16.0/node-v22.16.0-darwin-x64.tar.gz -o /tmp/node22.tar.gz ``` ``` sudo mkdir -p /usr/local/Cellar/node@22/22.16.0 ``` ``` sudo tar -xzf /tmp/node22.tar.gz -C /usr/local/Cellar/ node@22/22.16.0 --strip-components=1 ``` ``` sudo ln -sf /usr/local/Cellar/node@22/22.16.0/bin/node /usr/local/bin/node ``` ``` sudo ln -sf /usr/local/Cellar/node@22/22.16.0/bin/npm /usr/local/bin/npm ``` ``` sudo ln -sf /usr/local/Cellar/node@22/22.16.0/bin/npx /usr/local/bin/npx ``` ``` rm -f /tmp/node22.tar.gz ``` ``` sudo chown -R $(whoami) /usr/local/Cellar/node@22 ``` ``` sudo chown -R $(whoami) /usr/local/bin/node /usr/local/bin/npm /usr/local/bin/npx ``` **M1/M2/M3 芯片一键安装（只改第一行）：** ``` curl -fsSL https://nodejs.org/dist/v22.16.0/node-v22.16.0-darwin-arm64.tar.gz -o /tmp/node22.tar.gz ``` ``` sudo mkdir -p /usr/local/Cellar/node@22/22.16.0 ``` ``` sudo tar -xzf /tmp/node22.tar.gz -C /usr/local/Cellar/node@22/22.16.0 --strip-components=1 ``` ``` sudo ln -sf /usr/local/Cellar/node@22/22.16.0/bin/node /usr/local/bin/node ``` ``` sudo ln -sf /usr/local/Cellar/node@22/22.16.0/bin/npm /usr/local/bin/npm ``` ``` sudo ln -sf /usr/local/Cellar/node@22/22.16.0/bin/npx /usr/local/bin/npx ``` ``` rm -f /tmp/node22.tar.gz ``` ``` sudo chown -R $(whoami) /usr/local/Cellar/node@22 ``` ``` sudo chown -R $(whoami) /usr/local/bin/node /usr/local/bin/npm /usr/local/bin/npx ```

复制下面命令，一条一条在黑框框里回车执行，检查是否成功：

``` node -v ``` ``` npm -v ``` 出现 v22.16.0 就对了。 **报错 4：sharp 安装失败 / npm install 失败** **报错情况：安装卡在 sharp、报错退出**

复制下面命令，一条一条在黑框框里回车执行，再装

``` export SHARP_DIST_BASE_URL="https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/sharp-libvips/" ``` ``` export SHARP_IGNORE_GLOBAL_LIBVIPS=1 ``` **再执行安装：** ``` curl -fsSL https://openclaw.ai/install.sh | bash ``` **安装完怎么验证是否成功？**

复制下面 2 条命令，一条一条在黑框框里回车执行

``` node -v ``` ``` openclaw -v ```

▶ Frequently Asked Questions **Error 1:Homebrew / shallow clone** **Issue:homebrew-core is a shallow clone**

Copy the 5 commands below and execute them one by one in the terminal by pressing Enter

``` sudo rm -rf /usr/local/Homebrew/Library/Taps/homebrew/homebrew-core ``` ``` sudo mkdir -p /usr/local/Homebrew/Library/Taps/homebrew/homebrew-core ``` ``` sudo chown -R $(whoami) /usr/local/Homebrew/Library/Taps/homebrew ``` ``` cd /usr/local/Homebrew/Library/Taps/homebrew/homebrew-core ``` ``` git init && git remote add origin https://mirrors.ustc.edu.cn/homebrew-core.git && git fetch --depth=1 origin main && git checkout -b main origin/main ``` ``` git -C /usr/local/Homebrew/Library/Taps/homebrew/homebrew-core fetch --unshallow ``` ``` brew update ``` **Error 2:brewInstallation Locked / Download Stuck** **Issue: Installation is not moving or prompts for a lock file**

Copy the code below, paste it into the terminal, and press Enter

``` rm -rf /Users/$(whoami)/Library/Caches/Homebrew/downloads/*.incomplete ``` **Error 3:Node.js Version Insufficient / Cannot Install**
Requirement: Must be≥ 22.16.0 **Intel Chip One-Click Install:**

Copy the below and execute them one by one in the terminal by pressing Enter

``` curl -fsSL https://nodejs.org/dist/v22.16.0/node-v22.16.0-darwin-x64.tar.gz -o /tmp/node22.tar.gz ``` ``` sudo mkdir -p /usr/local/Cellar/node@22/22.16.0 ``` ``` sudo tar -xzf /tmp/node22.tar.gz -C /usr/local/Cellar/ node@22/22.16.0 --strip-components=1 ``` ``` sudo ln -sf /usr/local/Cellar/node@22/22.16.0/bin/node /usr/local/bin/node ``` ``` sudo ln -sf /usr/local/Cellar/node@22/22.16.0/bin/npm /usr/local/bin/npm ``` ``` sudo ln -sf /usr/local/Cellar/node@22/22.16.0/bin/npx /usr/local/bin/npx ``` ``` rm -f /tmp/node22.tar.gz ``` ``` sudo chown -R $(whoami) /usr/local/Cellar/node@22 ``` ``` sudo chown -R $(whoami) /usr/local/bin/node /usr/local/bin/npm /usr/local/bin/npx ``` **M1/M2/M3 Chip One-Click Install (Only first line changes):** ``` curl -fsSL https://nodejs.org/dist/v22.16.0/node-v22.16.0-darwin-arm64.tar.gz -o /tmp/node22.tar.gz ``` ``` sudo mkdir -p /usr/local/Cellar/node@22/22.16.0 ``` ``` sudo tar -xzf /tmp/node22.tar.gz -C /usr/local/Cellar/node@22/22.16.0 --strip-components=1 ``` ``` sudo ln -sf /usr/local/Cellar/node@22/22.16.0/bin/node /usr/local/bin/node ``` ``` sudo ln -sf /usr/local/Cellar/node@22/22.16.0/bin/npm /usr/local/bin/npm ``` ``` sudo ln -sf /usr/local/Cellar/node@22/22.16.0/bin/npx /usr/local/bin/npx ``` ``` rm -f /tmp/node22.tar.gz ``` ``` sudo chown -R $(whoami) /usr/local/Cellar/node@22 ``` ``` sudo chown -R $(whoami) /usr/local/bin/node /usr/local/bin/npm /usr/local/bin/npx ```

Copy the below and execute them one by one in the terminal by pressing Enter toverify success：

``` node -v ``` ``` npm -v ``` It is correct if v22.16.0 appears. **Error 4:sharp Installation Failed / npm install Failed** **Issue: installation stuck at sharp、or exits with an error**

Copy the 2 commands below and execute them one by one in the terminal, then install

``` export SHARP_DIST_BASE_URL="https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/sharp-libvips/" ``` ``` export SHARP_IGNORE_GLOBAL_LIBVIPS=1 ``` **Execute installation again:** ``` curl -fsSL https://openclaw.ai/install.sh | bash ``` **How to verify success after installation?**

Copy the 2 commands below and execute them one by one in the terminal

``` node -v ``` ``` openclaw -v ```

▶ 卸载篇 **如果哪天你想给电脑“减负”，或者想彻底重装，按这两步走：** **1. 一键卸载**

复制并执行卸载脚本：

``` npm uninstall -g openclaw ``` **2. 清理配置文件**

复制并执行清理脚本：

``` rm -rf ~/.openclaw rm -rf ~/openclaw-workspace ``` **3. 验证是否卸载成功**

打开终端/PowerShell，输入:

``` openclaw --version ```
(提示「找不到命令」卸载完成。)

▶ Uninstallation Section **If you ever want to "offload" your computer or perform a completely fresh reinstallation, follow these two steps:** 1. One-click Uninstall

Copy and execute the uninstallation script:

``` npm uninstall -g openclaw ``` 2. Clean up Configuration Files

Copy and execute the cleanup script:

``` rm -rf ~/.openclaw rm -rf ~/openclaw-workspace ``` 3. Verify if Uninstallation was Successful

OpenTerminal/PowerShelland enter:

``` openclaw --version ```
(If it says "command not found," the uninstallation is complete.)

(如何搜索技能请查看技能安装教程 )** **名称：self-improving-agent** 简介：自我进化智能体，自动学习纠错，记住所有历史经验 **下载地址：**

**名称：find-skills** 简介：智能找技能，从 13000 + 技能库自动匹配并安装最合适的 **下载地址：** **名称：apple-reminders** 简介：智能提醒管家，自然语言设置提醒，到点自动通知 **下载地址：**

**名称：agent-browser** 简介：浏览器自动化，自动打开网页、点击、输入、截图等操作 **下载地址：** **名称：skil-vetterl** 简介：技能安全审查，安装第三方技能前自动检测是否安全 **下载地址：**

**名称：auto-updater** 简介：自动更新，每日自动更新机器人与技能，并推送更新摘要 **下载地址：**

▶ 卸载方式 1.后台卸载 打开OpenClaw后台
http://127.0.0.1:18789/
在聊天栏里输入卸载+技能名称，即可移除技能 2.目录文件夹卸载 聊天栏询问OpenClaw技能是放在哪个文件夹下找到对应目录下文件夹，把技能文件夹删除即可完成卸载（如果未找到，可能文件夹被隐藏了，使用command+shift+.即可显示隐藏文件夹）

▶ Uninstallation Method 1.Uninstall via Dashboard Open the OpenClaw dashboard
http://127.0.0.1:18789/
Enter "uninstall + skill name" in the chat bar to remove the skill 2.Uninstall via Folder Directory Ask OpenClaw in the chat where the skills are stored, find the corresponding directory and delete the skill folder to uninstall. (If not found, the folder may be hidden; press command+shift+. to show hidden folders.)

▶ 第一部分：安装篇
（跟着一步步走）
**1. 准备工作（先看一眼）** - 电脑检查：确保你的电脑是**苹果电脑（macOS）** - 空间检查：留出大于 **10GB** 的空余空间 **2. 第一步：使用 QClaw 安装 Claude Code**
如果不会安装 QClaw，可先查看 QClaw 安装教程
在 QClaw 的聊天页面发送： ``` 没代理的情况下，帮我安装 Claude Code ``` 👉 **操作：** 直接发送上面这句话 无需在终端手动操作，QClaw 会自动完成安装。 当 QClaw 显示 **安装成功** 时即可进入下一步！ --- **3. 第二步：注册 DeepSeek + 获取 API Key**
此步骤需要你在浏览器中自己操作，QClaw 帮不了 👇
1. 浏览器打开 [https://platform.deepseek.com](https://platform.deepseek.com) 2. 登录账号 3. 找到 API Keys → 点击「创建 API Key」 4. 复制并保存这串 Key！⚠️ **只显示一次**，刷新页面后将无法再次查看！ 5. 如提示余额不足，充值 **10 元**即可（100 万 token 约 1~2 元，够用很久） --- **4. 第三步：使用 QClaw 安装 CC Switch，配置环境变量** 1. 在 QClaw 的聊天页面发送： ``` 帮我安装 CC Switch，并帮我配置 API Key ``` 👉 **操作：** 将第二步创建的 DeepSeek API Key 发送给 QClaw 2. 配置完成后，在 **CC Switch** 上启动 DeepSeek 的配置即可 --- ▶ 第二部分：验证篇
（看看成功没）
**1. 打开终端** 1. 按下键盘上的 `Command (⌘)` + `空格键` 2. 在弹出的搜索框里输入 `Terminal`（或中文「终端」） 3. 看到一个黑色的小图标，按回车键打开它 **2. 验证 Claude Code** 在终端里输入下面这行命令并回车： ```bash claude ``` 然后问它「你是什么模型？」 如果它返回了模型配置信息（比如 DeepSeek），恭喜你，你已经正式跨入 AI 自动化的大门了！ 🎉 --- ▶ 第三部分：VSCode 可视化工具（非必须）
（想要好看界面的看这里）
如果你不想用黑框框聊天，可以装一个可视化界面 👇 1. 在 QClaw 的聊天页面发送： ``` 帮我安装 VSCode，方便我操作 Claude Code ``` 👉 **操作：** 等它安装完 2. 安装完后让 QClaw **打开 VSCode** 3. 就能得到一个跟 QClaw 一样的可视化聊天界面，可以让它帮你执行命令，比黑框框更好看、更好用 ✨

▶ Part 1: Installation
(Follow these steps in order)
**1. Preparation (quick check)** - Device check: make sure you’re using a **Mac (macOS)** - Storage check: keep at least **10GB** of free space **2. Step 1: Install Claude Code with QClaw**
If you haven’t installed QClaw yet, check the QClaw installation tutorial first.
In QClaw chat, send: ``` Without a proxy, help me install Claude Code ``` 👉 **Action:** Send the message above as-is. No manual terminal work needed—QClaw will complete the installation automatically. When QClaw shows **Installed successfully**, move to the next step. --- **3. Step 2: Sign up for DeepSeek + get an API key**
This step must be done in your browser. QClaw can’t do it for you.
1. Open [https://platform.deepseek.com](https://platform.deepseek.com) 2. Sign in 3. Find API Keys → click “Create API Key” 4. Copy and save the key. ⚠️ **It’s shown only once**—after refreshing, you won’t be able to view it again. 5. If your balance is insufficient, top up **10 RMB** (about 1–2 RMB per 1M tokens; it usually lasts a long time). --- **4. Step 3: Install CC Switch with QClaw and set up environment variables** 1. In QClaw chat, send: ``` Help me install CC Switch and configure my API key ``` 👉 **Action:** Send the DeepSeek API key you created in Step 2 to QClaw. 2. After configuration is done, enable the DeepSeek profile in **CC Switch**. --- ▶ Part 2: Verification
(Make sure it works)
**1. Open Terminal** 1. Press `Command (⌘)` + `Space` 2. Type `Terminal` 3. Press Enter to open it **2. Verify Claude Code** In Terminal, run: ```bash claude ``` Then ask: “What model are you?” If it returns model configuration info (e.g., DeepSeek), congrats—you’ve officially stepped into AI automation. --- ▶ Part 3: VS Code GUI (Optional)
(If you want a nicer interface)
If you don’t want the terminal-style interface, you can install a visual UI: 1. In QClaw chat, send: ``` Help me install VS Code so I can work with Claude Code ``` 👉 **Action:** Wait for it to finish installing. 2. After installation, ask QClaw to **open VS Code**. 3. You’ll get a visual chat interface similar to QClaw, and it can execute commands for you—cleaner and easier to use.

▶ 卸载篇
（跟着一步步走）
**第一步：使用 QClaw 卸载 Claude Code** 在 QClaw 的聊天页面发送： ``` 帮我卸载 Claude Code ``` 👉 **操作：** 直接发送上面这句话 无需在终端手动操作，QClaw 会自动完成卸载。 --- ▶ 第二部分：验证篇
（看看卸干净没）
**1. 打开终端** 1. 按下键盘上的 `Command (⌘)` + `空格键` 2. 在弹出的搜索框里输入 `Terminal`（或中文「终端」） 3. 看到一个黑色的小图标，按回车键打开它 **2. 验证是否卸载成功** 在终端里输入下面这行命令并回车： ```bash claude ``` 如果出现 **找不到对应命令 / command not found**，说明已经卸载成功！ 🎉

▶ Uninstallation
(Follow these steps in order)
**Step 1: Uninstall Claude Code with QClaw** In QClaw chat, send: ``` Help me uninstall Claude Code ``` 👉 **Action:** Send the message above as-is. No manual terminal work needed—QClaw will uninstall it automatically. --- ▶ Part 2: Verification
(Make sure it’s fully removed)
**1. Open Terminal** 1. Press `Command (⌘)` + `Space` 2. Type `Terminal` 3. Press Enter to open it **2. Verify uninstallation** In Terminal, run: ```bash claude ``` If you see **command not found**, it means the uninstall succeeded.

▶ 第一部分：安装篇
（跟着一步步走）
**第一步：下载 QClaw** 1. 打开浏览器，访问 QClaw 官网：[https://qclaw.qq.com] 2. 点击页面上的 **「下载 macOS 版」** 按钮 3. 得到一个 `.dmg` 文件 **第二步：安装** 1. 双击下载好的 `.dmg` 文件 2. 在弹出的窗口里，把 **QClaw 图标** 拖到右边的 **「应用程序」** 文件夹 3. 关闭安装窗口 **第三步：首次打开（解决"无法打开"的问题）** macOS 对非 App Store 下载的应用有安全检查，第一次打开可能会提示：
⚠️ **「无法打开 QClaw，因为无法验证开发者」**
**解决方法：** 1. 打开 **系统设置** → **隐私与安全性** 2. 往下翻，找到 **「安全性」** 区域 3. 你会看到一行提示，旁边有个 **「仍要打开」** 按钮 4. 点它，再点 **「打开」** 5. 输入你的 **Mac 密码** 确认
💡 这一步只需要做一次，以后打开就不会再拦了。
--- ▶ 第二部分：登录篇
(绑上微信才能用）
1. 打开 QClaw，首次启动会看到登录界面 2. 用 **微信扫码登录** 3. 操作：手机微信 → 扫一扫 → 扫码 QClaw 上的二维码 4. 扫码后在手机上点击 **「确认登录」** 5. 登录成功后，QClaw 就和你的微信绑定了 --- ▶ 第三部分：配置篇
（调好这三项，用起来才顺手）
**基础配置** 登录后会进入 QClaw 主界面，做三件事： **5.1 启用远程操控** QClaw 的核心功能是用微信远程控制你的 Mac。 👉 **操作：** **设置** → **远控通道** → 添加微信关联 **5.2 设置唤醒方式** 为防止 Mac 休眠后连不上，建议勾选： 👉 **操作：** **设置** → **通用设置** → **休眠阻止** → 开启 **5.3 绑定微信机器人** 1. 在 QClaw 设置里找到 **「微信助手」** 或 **「机器人配置」** 2. 扫码关注 QClaw 的微信公众号/服务号 3. 关注后，在微信里给这个号发消息，QClaw 就会收到指令 --- ▶ 第四部分：验证篇
（看看成功没）
**验证——用微信远程操控 Mac** 用你绑定好的微信，给 QClaw 的公众号发一条消息： 👉 比如发： ``` 打开 Finder ``` 或者： ``` 截个图发给我 ``` 如果 QClaw 收到并执行了，说明 **安装成功！** 🎉

▶ Part 1: Installation
(Follow these steps in order)
**Step 1: Download QClaw** 1. Open a browser and visit QClaw’s official site: [https://qclaw.qq.com] 2. Click **“Download for macOS”** 3. You’ll get a `.dmg` file **Step 2: Install** 1. Double-click the downloaded `.dmg` file 2. In the pop-up window, drag the **QClaw icon** into the **Applications** folder 3. Close the installer window **Step 3: First launch (fix the “can’t be opened” prompt)** macOS performs security checks for apps downloaded outside the App Store. On the first launch, you might see:
⚠️ **“QClaw can’t be opened because the developer cannot be verified.”**
**How to fix it:** 1. Open **System Settings** → **Privacy & Security** 2. Scroll down to the **Security** section 3. You’ll see a prompt with an **“Open Anyway”** button 4. Tap it, then tap **“Open”** 5. Enter your **Mac password** to confirm
💡 You only need to do this once. After that, it won’t block future launches.
--- ▶ Part 2: Login
(You’ll need to link WeChat to use it)
1. Open QClaw. On the first launch, you’ll see the login screen. 2. Use WeChat to scan the QR code to log in. 3. On your phone: WeChat → Scan → scan the QR code shown in QClaw 4. After scanning, tap **“Confirm login”** on your phone 5. After login, QClaw will be linked to your WeChat account --- ▶ Part 3: Setup
(Configure these three items for the best experience)
**Basic setup** After logging in, you’ll enter the QClaw home screen. Do these three things: **5.1 Enable remote control** QClaw’s core feature is controlling your Mac remotely via WeChat. 👉 **Action:** **Settings** → **Remote Control Channel** → add/link WeChat **5.2 Configure wake/sleep behavior** To prevent losing connection when your Mac sleeps, it’s recommended to enable: 👉 **Action:** **Settings** → **General** → **Prevent Sleep** → On **5.3 Link the WeChat bot** 1. In QClaw settings, find **“WeChat Assistant”** or **“Bot Settings”** 2. Scan to follow QClaw’s official WeChat account/service account 3. After following, send a message to that account in WeChat—QClaw will receive your commands --- ▶ Part 4: Verification
(Make sure it works)
**Verify: control your Mac remotely via WeChat** Using the WeChat account you linked, send a message to QClaw’s official account: 👉 For example: ``` Open Finder ``` Or: ``` Take a screenshot and send it to me ``` If QClaw receives and executes it, **the installation is successful!**

▶ 卸载篇
（就三步）
1. 打开 **访达** → **应用程序** 2. 找到 **QClaw** 3. 右键 → **移到废纸篓** 然后别忘了 **清空废纸篓**，就彻底卸载干净了 🎉

▶ Uninstallation
(Just 3 steps)
1. Open **Finder** → **Applications** 2. Find **QClaw** 3. Right-click → **Move to Trash** Don’t forget to **Empty Trash** to remove it completely.
▶ 卸载方式 在聊天栏里输入卸载+技能名称，即可移除技能 2.目录文件夹卸载 聊天栏询问OpenClaw技能是放在哪个文件夹下找到对应目录下文件夹，把技能文件夹删除即可完成卸载（如果未找到，可能文件夹被隐藏了，使用command+shift+.即可显示隐藏文件夹）

▶ Uninstallation Method Enter "uninstall + skill name" in the chat bar to remove the skill 2.Uninstall via Folder Directory Ask OpenClaw in the chat where the skills are stored, find the corresponding directory and delete the skill folder to uninstall. (If not found, the folder may be hidden; press command+shift+. to show hidden folders.)
